title: Create: D&D Ore veins disabler
description: disable ore veins in Create: Dreams & Desires because this option in config doesnt work
body:
**WHY?  BECAUSE THIS FUNCTION IN THE MOD CONFIG DOESN'T WORK**

---

## What does it do?
It just removes the ore veins from the mod
Create: Dreams & Desires and nothing more

I made this datapack for my modpack and decided to share it with everyone
